name: Amaretto Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: "Dallas Morning News", Food Section 9/29/94
Grease and flour two 9-inch cake pans. Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Beat egg whites until frothy, then beat in granulated sugar until stiff peaks form. Set aside.
Cream butter and brown sugar until fluffy. Beat in egg yolks one at a time. Sift flour, cocoa and baking soda together. Add to creamed mixture alternately with coffee, blending well after each addition.
Fold egg whites into batter. Pour into prepared pans. Bake 30 to 35 minutes or until done. Cool 10 minutes, then invert on wire rack and remove pans. Allow to cool completely before frosting.
Place one layer on a cake plate and spread frosting on top. Position second layer over the first. Spread frosting on cake sides and top. Decorate with shaved chocolate, if desired.
Amaretto Frosting: In a large bowl, cream together butter and sifted confectioner's sugar. Add unsweetened cocoa powder, amaretto and hot coffee. Beat until smooth.
